title: Whos the biggest Asuka fan of them all
display_title: Whos the biggest Asuka fan of them all
wikitext:
[]: Who's the biggest Asuka fan of them all? Post by C.A.P. » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:17 pm Certainly not me, but with the Asuka lovin' going on with the avatars and the pictures and the tattoos, might as well find who's the most ins...biggest Asuka fan 'round these parts. You may begin.

[]: Post by rhfxz1s » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:20 pm Have you not been in the "Asuka is hot" thread? Well from what I've seen around these parts it's a battle between Light and the guy (who's name escapes me) with the Asuka tattoo. I'm sure there are even crazier guys elsewhere though.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:21 pm Mr. Tines is the classic, refined choice Light is the obsessive otaku choice SSD is too waffy and can't decide if she digs Shinji, Asuka or the pairing the most

[]: Post by Light » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:23 pm Me, of course.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:26 pm In the world probaly Tiffany Grant, around EvaGeeks Lightt is the only one who comes to mind (can't top having mental conversations with Asuka.)

[]: Post by Spud » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:29 pm I actually would have thought it would be symbv but I would never have suspected that Mr. Tines was an Asuka fan I was honestly about to change my avatar to Asuka but I can't find anything that doesn't look slutty (or something that I'd want as an avatar) so I'm going with Unit -02 when I find a good one Oh and I love Asuka (not in an obsessive sort of way she's just my favorite character)

[]: Post by Allemann » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:29 pm Anno is the greatest fan.

[]: Post by Light » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:30 pm Spud wrote: I was honestly about to change my avatar to Asuka but I can't find anything that doesn't look slutty

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:31 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: In the world probaly Tiffany Grant

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:38 pm If you're talking about Asuka Langley Soryu, then that award goes to both Mr. Tines and Eric Blair. Or maybe Tiffany Grant. Also: Shinji's mai waifu, but Asuka and Rei are "cute".

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:41 pm Light, thus far, has been established as an obsessive Asuka fantard, though not much else. I wouldn't consider him for the title of Asuka's biggest fan.

[]: Post by Light » Wed Mar 30, 2011 5:42 pm ^ Tines is a bigger fan than myself? Oh please, do not amuse me so. My obsession can topple his "classy love" any day with a force of a thousand blazing suns. Only damaged people can love Asuka, and he's pretty normal from what I observe. Oh Sachi, why so jelly? Maybe one day you will be capable of something similar too if you try hard enough.

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Mar 30, 2011 6:11 pm Allemann wrote: Anno is the greatest fan.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed Mar 30, 2011 6:39 pm Light is certainly the biggest Asuka fapboy around here. I'm more of a Rei person myself although I swing all three ways, Asuka, Rei, and Mari.

[]: Post by Tankred » Wed Mar 30, 2011 6:42 pm Grimmjow wrote: Light is certainly the biggest Asuka fapboy around here. I'm more of a Rei person myself although I swing all three ways, Asuka, Rei, and Mari.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Wed Mar 30, 2011 6:43 pm Mirror, mirror, on the wall...

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed Mar 30, 2011 6:48 pm I also don't mind a little Misato. :) Too bad she doesn't have as many fans. But all four of dem girls at once......*blushes*

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Wed Mar 30, 2011 7:05 pm I nominate Eric Blair and esselfortium.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Mar 30, 2011 7:06 pm I thought essel was Rei fan?

[]: Post by Kendrix » Wed Mar 30, 2011 7:08 pm child of Lilith wrote: I nominate Eric Blair and esselfortium.
